question: List all employees
generated_sql:
SELECT "employeeNumber", "lastName", "firstName", "extension", "email", "officeCode", "reportsTo", "jobTitle" 
FROM employees 
ORDER BY "employeeNumber" 
LIMIT 100

question: Get customer names and cities
generated_sql:
SELECT "customerName", "city" 
FROM customers 
ORDER BY "customerName" 
LIMIT 100

question: List employee first and last names
Show all order statuses
generated_sql: SELECT DISTINCT orders."status" FROM orders ORDER BY orders."status" LIMIT 100

question: Get payments with customer country
correct_sql: SELECT p.*, c."country" FROM payments p JOIN customers c ON p."customerNumber" = c."customerNumber"
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    payments."customerNumber", 
    payments."checkNumber", 
    payments."paymentDate", 
    payments."amount", 
    customers."country" 
FROM 
    payments 
JOIN 
    customers ON payments."customerNumber" = customers."customerNumber" 
LIMIT 100

question: Count customers per country
correct_sql: SELECT "country", COUNT(*) AS "customerCount" FROM customers GROUP BY "country"
generated_sql:
SELECT "country", COUNT(*) AS "customer_count"
FROM customers
GROUP BY "country"
LIMIT 100

question: Total payments per customer
correct_sql: SELECT "customerNumber", SUM("amount") AS "totalPayments" FROM payments GROUP BY "customerNumber"
generated_sql:
SELECT customers."customerNumber", SUM(payments."amount") AS "totalPayments"
FROM customers
LEFT JOIN payments ON customers."customerNumber" = payments."customerNumber"
GROUP BY customers."customerNumber"
LIMIT 100

question: Number of orders per status
correct_sql: SELECT "status", COUNT(*) AS "orderCount" FROM orders GROUP BY "status"
generated_sql:
SELECT "status", COUNT(*) AS "count"
FROM orders
GROUP BY "status"
LIMIT 100

question: Products per product line
correct_sql: SELECT "productLine", COUNT(*) AS "productCount" FROM products GROUP BY "productLine"
generated_sql:
SELECT productlines."productLine", COUNT(products."productCode") AS "productCount"
FROM products
JOIN productlines ON products."productLine" = productlines."productLine"
GROUP BY productlines."productLine"
LIMIT 100

question: Total stock per product vendor
correct_sql: SELECT "productVendor", SUM("quantityInStock") AS "totalStock" FROM products GROUP BY "productVendor"
generated_sql:
SELECT "productVendor", SUM("quantityInStock") AS "totalStock"
FROM products
GROUP BY "productVendor"
LIMIT 100

question: Average buy price per product line
correct_sql: SELECT "productLine", AVG("buyPrice") AS "avgBuyPrice" FROM products GROUP BY "productLine"
generated_sql:
SELECT productlines."productLine", AVG(products."buyPrice") AS averageBuyPrice
FROM products
JOIN productlines ON products."productLine" = productlines."productLine"
GROUP BY productlines."productLine"
LIMIT 100

question: Max MSRP per product line
correct_sql: SELECT "productLine", MAX("MSRP") AS "maxMSRP" FROM products GROUP BY "productLine"
generated_sql:
SELECT productlines."productLine", MAX(products."MSRP") AS maxMSRP
FROM products
JOIN productlines ON products."productLine" = productlines."productLine"
GROUP BY productlines."productLine"

question: Min buy price per vendor
correct_sql: SELECT "productVendor", MIN("buyPrice") AS "minBuyPrice" FROM products GROUP BY "productVendor"
